mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, primary_uid, approval_type, template_name, template_identity, appro_url, template_content
mapper.insert:
insert into rdp_cache_appro_template (primary_uid, approval_type, template_name, template_identity, appro_url) values
( #{item.primaryUid}, #{item.approvalType, typeHandler=com.clougence.clouddm.console.web.dal.handler.RdpApprovalTypeHandler}, #{item.templateName}, #{item.templateIdentity}, #{item.approUrl} )
